payload.title: 🚀 The high frontiersman: Gerard K. O'Neill
payload.author: JAMES PETHOKOUKIS
payload.summary: He accepted the Down Wing 1970s diagnosis of humanity's future of overpopulation and scarcity. His Up Wing cure was to leave the planet for Solar System abundance
